title: C&K: Pearl Jam
description: A small addon for Crop and Kettle that adds a pearl jam plush from JoJo.
body:
# C&K: Pearl Jam
C&K: Pearl Jam is small addon for Crop and Kettle that adds a Pearl Jam plush from JoJo's Bizzare Adventure.

Currently C&K: Pearl Jam adds the Pearl Jam plush, a small plushie that can be cooked up with Crop and Kettle's cooking pot!

If you are curious on how do get the Pearl Jam plush, see if your local butcher has anything new in store...

HEY! This is an addon datapack! It will do nothing or break if Crop and Kettle ([Github Page](https://github.com/maybejake/crop-and-kettle) [Modrinth Page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/crop-and-kettle)), is not installed. Go install it!

## FAQ:
> Why aren't the textures working?
> 
The downloadable pack file contains BOTH the resource pack and datapack! Make sure to also add it to your resource pack folder and enable it along with the datapacks folder in your world. (If you are using the mod version, this doesn't apply to you.)

> Will you port to version XYZ?
> 
It all depends, I most likely will not unless I have time!

---

Created By:
Stateus and Pan_Womsacz

Pearl Jam Plush Model by [chochi](https://x.com/i/status/1831374345526243654)
